title: Vectorientation:RF
description: Rotates falling blocks into the direction they're heading
body:
This Mod is a NeoForge port version of [Vectorientation](https://modrinth.com/mod/vectorientation).

Description by the original author:
This tiny client mod will rotate any dropped blocks (such as sand or anvil) in the direction they move, and has additional options to squeeze and stretch them according to their speed to maximize the application of animation principles.

New features added to this Mod:
Added piston extension animation to the base Mod.
